jobs.title: Join Our Familia
jobs.subtitle: Be part of the Mango's Grill family
jobs.hiringDesc: Become part of our growing family and help bring the flavors of Venezuela to Texas.
jobs.noOpenings: No openings match this filter right now.
jobs.headChefDesc: Lead our kitchen team to deliver authentic Venezuelan dishes. You will oversee menu execution, ingredient sourcing, and train junior cooks.
jobs.serverDesc: Provide warm, attentive service to our guests. Prior restaurant experience preferred but not required -- we train our familia.
jobs.lineCookDesc: Prepare dishes to order with consistency and speed. A passion for Latin American cuisine is a plus.
jobs.deliveryDriverDesc: Deliver orders to customers across the city. Valid driver's license and reliable vehicle required.
jobs.healthBenefitsDesc: Full-time team members receive comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage.
jobs.freeMealsDesc: Enjoy a complimentary meal every shift and 50% discount for family and friends.
jobs.growthDesc: We promote from within. Many of our managers started as line cooks or servers.
jobs.experiencePlaceholder: Tell us about your relevant experience...
jobs.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.

about.title: Our Passion for Authentic Venezuelan Cuisine
about.storyP1: Mango's Grill was born from a simple dream: to bring the authentic flavors of Venezuela to the heart of Texas. Founded in 2018 by Chef Carlos Mendoza, our restaurant started as a small kitchen in Houston's vibrant Montrose District.
about.storyP2: Growing up in Caracas, Carlos learned to cook from his grandmother, who believed that food was the purest expression of love. Every arepa, every pabellon, every tequeño on our menu carries that tradition forward -- made from scratch daily with recipes passed down through generations.
about.storyP3: Today, with three locations across Texas, we continue to honor those roots while embracing the diverse culinary landscape of our adopted home. Every dish tells a story, and we invite you to be part of ours.
about.valuesDesc: Everything we do is guided by our commitment to authenticity, community, and the joy of sharing great food.
about.missionDesc: To share the rich, vibrant flavors of Venezuelan cuisine with every guest who walks through our doors, creating unforgettable dining experiences rooted in tradition.
about.visionDesc: To become the leading Venezuelan restaurant brand in the United States, celebrated for authenticity, quality, and the warmth of our hospitality.
about.valuesItemDesc: Family, authenticity, and community drive everything we do. We source responsibly, cook with passion, and treat every guest like familia.
about.teamDesc: Meet the passionate team that brings Venezuelan cuisine to life every single day.
about.ctaTitle: Come Experience the Taste of Venezuela
about.ctaDesc: Whether you're craving a classic arepa or exploring Venezuelan cuisine for the first time, we can't wait to welcome you.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.pickupDesc: Pick up your order at the selected location
checkout.pickupInfo: Your order will be ready for pickup at the selected location. You will receive a notification when it's ready.
checkout.locationConsentDesc: We need your location to auto-fill your delivery address. Your location data is used solely for delivery purposes and is protected in accordance with GDPR, CCPA, and applicable data privacy regulations. We do not store or share your geolocation data with third parties.
checkout.stripeSecure: Your payment is processed securely via Stripe. We never store your card details.
checkout.stripeNotConfigured: Stripe is not configured. Set NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY to enable card payments.
checkout.loginRequiredDesc: Please log in to complete your order. Your cart will be preserved.
checkout.loginError: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
